title: Frunchettan-sai
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Species |image= |name=Frunchettan-sai |designation=[[Sentience/Legends|Sentient]][[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] |class= |subspecies= |races= |height= |length= |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor= |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor= |distinctions=*Joint between [[Limb/Legends|wrist]] and elbow *Sight largely in [[Color/Legends|blue]]-[[Ultraviolet/Legends|ultraviolet]] part of [[Spectrum/Legends|spectrum]] |lifespan= |origin=[[Frunchettan system/Legends|Frunchettan system]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}{{Planetnamia|species=Frunchettan-sai|system=[[Frunchettan system/Legends|Frunchettan system]]|legends=1}} |habitat= |diet= |language= }} {{Quote|What are Frunchies?"''
''"The Frunchettan-sai. They have a couple of colony worlds in the Outer Rim.|Jorj Car'das and Maris Ferasi|}} The '''Frunchettan-sai''', referred to as the '''Frunchies''' by the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Merchant/Legends|trader]] [[Dubrak Qennto]], were a [[Species/Legends|species]] that originated in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] and controlled several [[Colonist/Legends|colony]] [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. By [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]], an art piece created by a Frunchettan-sai was stored in the treasure room of a [[Vagaari plunder ship|plunder starship]] used by the [[Vagaari/Legends|Vagaari]] species. The [[Starship/Legends|ship]] was [[Skirmish in the Crustai system|captured]] that [[Standard year/Legends|year]] by [[Force Commander]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Mitth'raw'nuruodo]] of the [[Chiss Expansionary Fleet/Legends|Chiss Expansionary Fleet]], who, during a subsequent inspection of the treasure room in the company of Qennto and his crewmembers, identified the physical characteristics of the Frunchettan-sai [[Artist/Legends|artist]] without being previously familiar with their species. ==Biology and appearance== {{Quote|Those, for instance, were probably created by beings with an extra joint between wrist and elbow, who see largely in the blue-ultraviolet part of the spectrum.|Force Commander Mitth'raw'nuruodo, on a piece of Frunchettan-sai art|}} The Frunchettan-sai were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] that had a joint on their [[Limb/Legends|limbs]] between wrist and elbow. The species' sight was largely centered in the [[Color/Legends|blue]] and [[Ultraviolet/Legends|ultraviolet]] part of the [[Spectrum/Legends|spectrum]]. ==Society and culture== {{Quote|It's signed with formal Frunchy script.|Dubrak Qennto, on the Frunchettan-sai art piece|}} The Frunchettan-sai used a [[Frunchy script|formal script]] that was used on one occasion for markings on a piece of artwork resembling nested [[tressle]]s. ==Frunchettan-sai in the galaxy== {{Quote|I thought you said you hadn't made it to Republic space."''
''"To the best of my knowledge, we haven't. But the artist's physical characteristics are obvious simply from looking at his work.|Dubrak Qennto and Force Commander Mitth'raw'nuruodo|}} The Frunchettan-sai originated in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space's]] [[Frunchettan system/Legends|Frunchettan system]]. During the final [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]] of the existence of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], the Frunchettan-sai controlled a handful of [[Colonist/Legends|colony]] [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].{{CSWECite|I|297|Frunchettan-sai}} By [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of [[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] to [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]]. the Frunchettan-sai had become a part of Republic [[Realspace/Legends|space]]. That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], a piece of Frunchettan-sai art was present in the treasure room of a [[Vagaari plunder ship|starship]] the nomadic [[Vagaari/Legends|Vagaari]] species used to transport plunder obtained through [[Pirate/Legends|piracy]] and [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] raids. The [[Starship/Legends|ship]] was [[Skirmish in the Crustai system|captured]] in the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]] by [[Picket Force Two/Legends|Picket Force Two]] of the [[Chiss Expansionary Fleet/Legends|Chiss Expansionary Fleet]], [[Commanding officer/Legends|led]] by [[Force Commander]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Mitth'raw'nuruodo]], also [[Core name/Legends|known]] as Thrawn. [[File:Outboundthrawn.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Force Commander Mitth'raw'nuruodo (pictured) was able to identify the physical characteristics of the author of a Frunchettan-sai art piece.]] The [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]] subsequently invited a trio of [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Merchant/Legends|traders]] he had captured earlier and made his guests—the [[Captain/Legends|captain]] [[Dubrak Qennto]] and his crewmembers, [[Maris Ferasi]] and [[Jorj Car'das]]—to inspect the treasure room in order to try and recognize any of the species the Vagaari had come into contact with. Thrawn instructed his companions to concentrate on identifying the origin of any artwork and, as an example demonstration, pointed at a piece of Frunchettan-sai art, proceeding to describe the physical characteristics of the item's creator without being aware of the identity of the [[Artist/Legends|artist's]] species. Ferasi and Qennto suspected the description matched that of the Frunchettan-sai—whom Qennto referred to as "Frunchies" and the relatively inexperienced Car'das was not familiar with—and the Human captain inspected the artwork closer. Upon confirming that it was indeed of Frunchettan-sai origin, Qennto wondered whether the Chiss, despite prior claims by Thrawn, had in fact established contact with the Republic before, only for the commander to inform him that he had merely utilized deductive reasoning in his characterization of the item's author. None of the Humans, however, were able to identify the visual cues Thrawn had obtained from the Frunchettan-sai artwork. The Frunchettan [[Star system/Legends|system]] lay outside the borders of space controlled by the Republic's eventual successor, the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]].''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' ==Behind the scenes== The Frunchettan-sai were first mentioned in the [[2006]] novel [[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] by [[Timothy Zahn]]. ==Appearances== *[[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] {{Ab|Outbound Flight (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}} *[[Outbound Flight (abridged audiobook)|''Outbound Flight'' abridged audiobook]] {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Frunchettan-sai }} [[Category:Wild Space sentient species]]
